stemHtml:
Which statements about runway strips are correct?

1. Includes stopway or RESA
2. Includes runway and stopway
3. No moving objects except emergency
4. No fixed objects except frangible navaids
5. Extends laterally at least 50m
6. Includes only the runway
7. At least 75m from centreline
8. Extends to stopway end
9. Width equals runway width
